# Software

## R Packages

::: {.columns .profile-layout}

:::: {.column width="20%"}

![](images/GofCens.png){width=100%}

::::

:::: {.column width="80%"}

### GofCens

**Authors:**  
Mireia Besalú, Klaus Langohr, Matilde Francisco, **Arnau Garcia-Fernández**, Guadalupe Gómez Melis

**Description:**  
The **GofCens** R package offers graphical tools and implements goodness-of-fit tests for right-censored data.

**Links**

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/ArnauGF/GofCens)
- [CRAN Package](https://cran.r-project.org/package=GofCens)
- [R Journal Paper](https://doi.org/10.32614/RJ-2025-026)

::::

:::
